center.name: Bernhard Christian Otto
center.summary: Bernhard Christian Otto是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白啄木，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white woodpecker (Melanerpes candidus) is a South American species of woodpecker (family Picidae) native to the wooded grasslands of Suriname, French Guiana, Brazil, Bolivia, Paraguay, Uruguay and Argentina
